description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian figure with a youthful appearance, featuring a short, layered hairstyle. He is dressed in a casual, short-sleeved t-shirt paired with knee-length shorts that have a two-tone design. The figure's arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and his legs are straight, giving a natural standing posture. He wears low-top athletic sneakers with visible laces, adding to the casual urban look. The facial features are simplified, with a neutral expression and no visible accessories or carried items. The overall design is clean and suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or residential streets.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a short hairstyle, t-shirt, two-tone shorts, and athletic sneakers, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, short-sleeved t-shirt, two-tone shorts, and sneakers with laces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the layered look of the shorts and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, t-shirt, shorts, and the heel detail of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and knee-length shorts
